users.title: User Profile
users.description: Metadata for registered users, tracks authorization status

uid.description: The unique user identifier matching Firebase Auth UID

isAdmin.description: Whether the user can upload and manage tracks

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was initialized

tracks.title: Music Track
tracks.description: Metadata matching an audio file uploaded or referenced

artist.description: The performing artist of the track

audioUrl.description: The static link to the audio file in Storage

coverUrl.description: The image asset linked to the track cover art

genre.description: Main style category of the music track

lyrics.description: Verbatim text of the lyrics contents

sharesCount.description: Count of times social share clicked

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the track was mapped

likes.title: Track Like
likes.description: User action bookmarking a specific music file

userId.description: User identifier who completed the action

comments.title: Track Comment
comments.description: User review or text comments on songs

playlists.title: User Playlist
playlists.description: A collection of ordered tracks grouped together by a user

coverUrl.description: Thumbnail image of the playlist cover

creatorId.description: The user ID who built the playlist

isPublic.description: Can other users find this playlist

/users/{userId}.description: Profiles accessible individually or for admin querying

/tracks/{trackId}.description: List of all songs uploaded and playable

/tracks/{trackId}/comments/{commentId}.description: Interactive feedback messages left on tracks

/likes/{likeId}.description: Atomic like document references map userId_trackId
